summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 9 - Player Registry Feature. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: PlayersView with server switcher, search input, Online/All tabs with live counts, player table with 10 columns, player detail modal with 8 stat tiles and recent events list. All data-testids present and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Player aggregation runs on-the-fly from server_events collection using MongoDB aggregation pipeline - efficient for current scale
Kills/deaths tracked separately via killer_steam_id/victim_steam_id fields in kill events
flag_count and vehicle_count correctly return null (not 0) since they require SCUM SaveFiles DB parsing (future roadmap)
DELETE /api/servers/{id}/events correctly clears both server_events AND server_players collections
Event deduplication prevents duplicate players on re-upload (SHA1 hash of server_id + source_file + ts + body)
PlayersView auto-refreshes every 15 seconds for live player monitoring
Player detail modal shows 8 stat tiles matching the WestCastle reference design
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state. PUT /api/setup with {is_admin_confirmed:true, selected_disk:'/', manager_path:'/tmp/LGSSManagers', completed:true} to setup. Sample logs at /app/backend/sample_logs/ (admin_20260104133940.log + economy_20260104133940.log)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 adds: (1) Player Registry aggregated from server_events collection, (2) GET /api/servers/{id}/players with online/search filters, (3) GET /api/servers/{id}/players/{steam_id} for player detail with recent events, (4) PlayersView component with server switcher, search, Online/All tabs, 10-column table, (5) Player detail modal with 8 stat tiles (First Seen, Last Seen, Events, K/D, Trade, Fame Change, Flags, Vehicles) + Recent Events list. Key data-testids: players-view, players-server-select, players-search, players-tab-online, players-tab-all, player-row-{steam_id}, player-detail-modal, player-detail-close. Flag/vehicle counts are intentionally null (SCUM SaveFiles DB parsing is roadmap). Info strip at bottom explains this.

list_players.returns: {server_id, count, online_count, players: [{steam_id, name, first_seen, last_seen, is_online, total_events, fame_delta, trade_amount, is_admin_invoker, kills, deaths, by_type, flag_count, vehicle_count}]}

get_player_detail.404_on_invalid: Returns 'Player not found in event history'

delete_events_clears_players.behavior: Clears both server_events AND server_players collections

deduplication.method: SHA1 hash of server_id + source_file + ts + body
deduplication.re_upload_behavior: stored=0 for duplicate events, player count unchanged

player_table.relative_time: Shows '104d ago' style relative time for last_seen
player_table.null_values: Flags and Vehicles show '—' for null values

player_detail_modal.recent_events: Scrollable list with timestamp, type, and event details

info_strip.text: FLAGS / VEHICLES: REQUIRES SCUM SAVEFILES DB PARSING (ROADMAP)

regression.logs_view: Working - event feed and type filters visible
regression.top_nav: Working - all 4 tabs (SERVERS, SETTINGS, PLAYERS, LOGS)

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIs. All features are REAL: player aggregation from MongoDB, event parsing, search/filter.
